title: Zcash targets July 28 launch for Ironwood network upgrade
summary: Zcash’s next upgrade will replace the once-compromised Orchard pool and may offer clues about whether counterfeit tokens were created via a recent bug.

title: Hackers tried to backdoor Injective npm package to steal wallet keys
summary: The incident is significant for developers and applications that handle Injective wallet workflows, Socket researchers said.

title: Yen Traders Question How Japan Pension Money Can Sustain Rally
summary: The big question for traders tracking the yen’s sudden rally on Friday is whether the government will follow through on its call to draw the country’s huge pension chest back into investments at home.

title: Corn Steadies Ahead of Key US Supply Report as Heat Threats Ease
summary: Corn futures steadied ahead of a key monthly US report on supply and demand, while concerns about weather risks eased.

title: AI Agents Could Be Turned Into Botnets Through Hallucinations, Researchers Warn
summary: Researchers warn AI agents could be tricked into downloading malicious code by exploiting the same hallucinations that cause chatbots to make mistakes.

title: Avalanche Treasury Firm AVAX One Reclaims Nasdaq Compliance After Reverse Stock Split
summary: AVAX One, which stockpiles the native token of the Avalanche crypto network, is back in Nasdaq's good graces after a reverse stock split.
